ThingDef.label: Ancient cultivator compass-Ruins
ThingDef.description: The Qi from the ancient cultivator relics was studied using a spiritual energy analyzer, which led to the invention of a special detection compass that can distinguish ancient cultivator spiritual Qi. It contains a complex chip structure and will burn out after one use.\n\nThis compass is very sensitive to the direction ofancient cultivator relic sites.

li.useLabel: Activate the compass, reveal the location of a relic

ThingDef.label: Cultivator compass-Graves
ThingDef.description: The Qi from the ancient cultivator relics was studied using a spiritual energy analyzer, which led to the invention of a special detection compass that can distinguish cultivator spiritual Qi. It contains a complex chip structure and will burn out after one use.\n\nThis compass is very sensitive to the direction of cultivator's grave.

li.useLabel: Activate the compass, reveal the location of a grave

ThingDef.label: Ancient cultivator compass-Ancient boss
ThingDef.description: The Qi from the ancient cultivator relics was studied using a spiritual energy analyzer, which led to the invention of a special detection compass that can distinguish ancient cultivator spiritual Qi. It contains a complex chip structure and will burn out after one use.\n\nThis compass has a special sensitivity to the ancient cryogenic sleep chambers, allowing for precise location of a functioning ancient cultivator cryogenic sleep chamber.

li.useLabel: Activate the compass, reveal the location of a relic with an ancient cultivator
